content:
535+ Free DevOps Interview Questions

If you're preparing for a DevOps interview, I built

a completely free platform called DevOps Rise.

🔗 devopsrise.vercel.app

What's inside:

🎯 535+ Interview Questions

• Linux & System Admin

• Docker & Kubernetes

• AWS, Azure & GCP

• CI/CD (Jenkins & GitHub Actions)

• Terraform & Ansible

• Prometheus & ELK Stack

• Git & Version Control

• Security & Networking

• Scripting & Automation

• Mock Interview Scenarios

All questions have Beginner / Intermediate /

Advanced levels with detailed answers.

🗺️ 122-Day Learning Roadmap

Day-by-day breakdown — exactly what to study each day.

Download as PDF.

📋 Commands Cheatsheet

Linux, Docker, kubectl, Git, Terraform, AWS CLI

— click to copy, PDF download available.

⏱️ Mock Interview Mode

10 random questions with 2-minute timer per question.

Track progress, bookmark important questions.

📄 Free PDF Downloads

Every topic has downloadable PDF with DevOps Rise

watermark.

100% Free — No Login Required

Check it out: devopsrise.vercel.app

Would love feedback from the DevOps community!
